# GenAI Tech Labs

> AI-powered CRO (Conversion Rate Optimisation) agency for Indian ecommerce brands on Shopify and WooCommerce.

## Who We Are

GenAI Tech Labs helps Indian ecommerce brands convert more visitors into buyers using AI-powered analysis and human CRO expertise. We analyse why traffic leaves without buying and fix it — delivering more revenue from the traffic you're already paying for.

## Our Tool: OwlEye Score™ (Beta)

- Free instant audit of 28 conversion parameters across 6 pillars
- Powered by AI (GPT-4o / Claude) + Google PageSpeed Insights (real Lighthouse score)
- Pillar weights: Purchase Flow (28%) · Page Experience (22%) · Trust & Conversion (18%) · Engagement (12%) · Agentic Commerce (10%) · Technical Foundation (10%)
- Includes agentic commerce scoring: how well AI agents can discover, read, and rank your store
- Try the tool: https://genaitechlabs.com/#score-tool

## The 6-Pillar OwlEye Framework

### 1. Purchase Flow (weight: 28%)
Checkout flow, payment options (UPI/COD/BNPL), cart recovery, express checkout, COD prominence

### 2. Page Experience (weight: 22%)
Landing page quality, product pages, search UX, sticky add-to-cart, category pages

### 3. Trust & Conversion (weight: 18%)
Trust signals, returns policy, social proof, review quality, guarantee signals

### 4. Engagement & Retention (weight: 12%)
Cross-sell & upsell, email capture, WhatsApp marketing

### 5. Agentic Commerce (weight: 10%)
Schema markup, content clarity for LLMs, AI discoverability, conversational UX, Open Graph quality, canonical health

### 6. Technical Foundation (weight: 10%)
Mobile UX, page speed (Google Lighthouse), navigation clarity, accessibility

## Services

- **CRO Audit (Free)** — Full funnel diagnostic, prioritised fixes, revenue estimates within 5 days
- **A/B Testing** — Structured experiments on highest-traffic pages (hypothesis → design → analysis)
- **Checkout Optimisation** — Cart, payment options, and post-purchase experience
- **Landing Page Optimisation** — Ad landing pages and PDPs rebuilt for conversion

## Industry Focus

- Indian ecommerce on Shopify and WooCommerce
- UPI, COD, and BNPL payment optimisation
- Mobile-first conversion (67% of Indian ecommerce traffic is mobile)
- Agentic commerce readiness (AI agent discoverability and structured data)

## Industry Benchmarks (Indian Ecommerce)

- Average CVR: 1.8%
- Optimised store CVR: 4.2%
- Average OwlEye Score: 58/100
- CVR lift per OwlEye point: ~0.125%
